src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/Lambda.general_idea: Add Apache Commons IO dependency for file utility operations.
Add deduplication registry classes to handle event processing.
Add new server command implementations for start, stop, reboot, and restart.
Add new instance command implementations for start and stop.
Replace Ec2ClientProvider with Ec2ClientPool for better resource management.
Introduce BotCommunicator to encapsulate bot interaction logic.
Refactor CommandDispatcher to accept BotCommunicator instead of AbsSender.
Register new /startServer command with V2 implementation.
Register new /stopServer command with V2 implementation.
Register new /rebootServer command.
Register new /restartServer command.
Register new /startInstance command.
Register new /stopInstance command.
Move environment variable access to ConfigManager static methods.
Implement event deduplication using FSUpdateEventsRegistry.
Notify user via bot on parsing errors instead of just returning HTTP error.
Notify user via bot on handling errors instead of just returning HTTP error.
Return empty JSON body and 201 status on errors to prevent gateway issues.
Add detailed logging for user communication start.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/Lambda.human_impl: log.info("User {} has started communication with the bot", userName);

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/Lambda.general_idea: Extract chat ID and set it on communicator for context-aware responses.
Remove local getAppVersion method in favor of ConfigManager static import.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Replace direct Telegram Bot API sender dependency with a custom BotCommunicator abstraction to decouple dispatch logic from the library.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: private final BotCommunicator botCommunicator; public CommandDispatcher(BotCommunicator botCommunicator) { this.botCommunicator = botCommunicator; }

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Switch command registry from HashMap to LinkedHashMap to ensure deterministic iteration order for help text.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: private final Map<String, BotCommand<?>> registeredCommand = new LinkedHashMap<>();

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Remove checked TelegramApiException from method signatures and handle errors internally via custom exceptions.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: public void handle(Update updateEvent) { ... } catch (InvalidCommandException e) { ... }

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Delegate error message sending to the new BotCommunicator abstraction instead of constructing SendMessage objects directly.
Add support for EmptyResponse type to prevent IllegalStateException when commands return no text.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: } else if (!(resp instanceof EmptyResponse)) { throw new IllegalStateException(...); }

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Register new command implementations in the sealed interface permits list to allow compilation of the expanded command set.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: permits ListInstancesCommand, VersionCommand, HelpCommand, StopInstanceCommand, StartInstanceCommand, StartServerCommandV2, StopServerCommandV2, RestartServerCommand, StartServerCommand, StopServerCommand, RebootServerCommand

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Refine the application description in the help command to accurately reflect EC2 instance management and list supported AWS regions.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Changed APP_DESCRIPTION string to mention 'EC2 Instances (Servers)' and added specific region support details (us-east-1, eu-north-1, eu-west-2).

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Update imports and instantiation to use the renamed Ec2Manager class instead of the deprecated Ec2InstanceManager.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: import org.github.akarkin1.ec2.Ec2Manager; ... Ec2Manager instanceManager = new Ec2Manager(clientProvider);

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Delegate region iteration and instance fetching to the new Ec2Manager abstraction, removing manual client creation and region looping from the command.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Ec2Manager instanceManager = new Ec2Manager(clientProvider); for (InstanceInfo instance : instanceManager.getAllInstances())

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.general_idea: Remove imports for Ec2Client and Region which are no longer used directly in this class after the refactoring.
Change the list output format from numbered items to bullet points and update the header text.
Modify the displayed instance details to show 'Location' instead of 'Region' and always include the Public IP if valid, rather than appending it conditionally on a new line.
Remove the private helper method getAllRegions as its functionality is now encapsulated within Ec2Manager.
Refactor version retrieval by removing inline resource reading logic and delegating to a centralized ConfigManager utility.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/dispat.human_impl: Replaced private `readVersion()` method and its imports with a call to `ConfigManager.getAppVersion()`.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/ec2/Ec.general_idea: Convert the Ec2ClientProvider class into an interface to enable dependency injection and decouple client creation logic.
src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/ec2/Ec.human_impl: Changed 'public class Ec2ClientProvider' to 'public interface Ec2ClientProvider' and removed method bodies.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/ec2/Ec.general_idea: Remove the import for software.amazon.awssdk.regions.Region as it is no longer used after removing the implementation details.

src/main/java/org/github/akarkin1/ec2/In.general_idea: Add a region field to the InstanceInfo class to store the AWS region of the EC2 instance.
